# settings

Change OS settings and app permissions

## Usage

```bash
agent-device settings <wifi|airplane|location> <on|off> | settings appearance <light|dark|toggle> | settings faceid <match|nonmatch|enroll|unenroll> | settings touchid <match|nonmatch|enroll|unenroll> | settings fingerprint <match|nonmatch> | settings permission <grant|deny|reset> <camera|microphone|photos|contacts|contacts-limited|notifications|calendar|location|location-always|media-library|motion|reminders|siri> [full|limited] | settings permission <grant|reset> <accessibility|screen-recording|input-monitoring>
```

## Session Requirement

Usually expects an active session.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- None

## Allowed Flags

- None

## Platform Coverage

| Target | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| iOS sim | Yes |
| iOS device | No |
| tvOS sim | Yes |
| macOS | Yes |
| Android emu | Yes |
| Android device | Yes |
| Android TV | Yes |
